commands.summary: [AC-2] src/backup.test.ts covers representative multi-track state, encrypted round-trip, legacy JSON import, and legacy schema migration.
[AC-3] src/backup.ts rejects malformed JSON and unsupported encrypted envelopes safely.
[AC-3] src/backup.test.ts covers malformed JSON, wrong passphrase, unsupported version, and truncated encrypted payloads.
[AC-4] docs/backup-restore.md records Windows support plus Android blocker on 217 and iOS blocker on 218.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
